SEARCH
Package model.research

Class ResearchProject

java.lang.Object
model.research.ResearchProject
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ResearchProject extends Object implements Serializable
Research project containing a topic, published papers, and researcher participants.

  • Method Details

    • addParticipant

      public void addParticipant(User user) throws NotAResearcherException
      Adds a participant after validating researcher eligibility.
      Parameters:
      user - user attempting to join the project
      Throws:
      NotAResearcherException - if the user does not have researcher capability
